defaultTitle: Jagankumar E — Technical Architect | DIGIT & CARE HMIS | eGov Foundation
defaultDescription: Technical Architect with 7+ years building digital public infrastructure for India and Africa. Led architecture for DIGIT Studio (low-code framework), Care HMIS/TeleICU (healthcare interoperability), HCM Console (health campaigns), MUKTA (employment schemes), and DIGIT Urban (450+ cities). Expertise in React, Django, Kubernetes, DICOM/PACS, and configurable platforms serving millions.
